patch.value:
## Context

pm list (src/cli/commands/list.ts) supports: --updated-after, --updated-before, --created-after, --created-before, --assignee, --assignee-filter, --sprint, --release, --parent.
pm search (src/cli/commands/search.ts SearchOptions interface, lines 65-82) supports only: --status, --type, --tag, --priority, --deadline-before, --deadline-after.
SEARCH_FLAG_CONTRACTS (src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts lines 1189-1207) and TOOL_SEARCH_FILTER_OPTION_CONTRACTS (src/sdk/cli-contracts/tool-option-contracts.ts lines 63-73) also omit these flags, so MCP pm_search is also missing them.

## Acceptance criteria

- pm search accepts all 8 missing filter flags matching pm list semantics
- SEARCH_FLAG_CONTRACTS and TOOL_SEARCH_FILTER_OPTION_CONTRACTS updated to include new flags
- MCP pm_search tool parameter table updated
- Shell completions (src/cli/commands/completion.ts bash/zsh/fish search sections) updated
- Docs updated: docs/COMMANDS.md search section and docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md token-minimal retrieval table

## Evidence

- src/cli/commands/search.ts:65-82 (SearchOptions interface — missing fields)
- src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts:1189-1207 (SEARCH_FLAG_CONTRACTS — missing flags)
- src/sdk/cli-contracts/tool-option-contracts.ts:63-73 (TOOL_SEARCH_FILTER_OPTION_CONTRACTS)
- src/cli/commands/list.ts:24-54 (ListOptions — has all filters)
- docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md:107 (updated-after shown only for pm list-all, not search)
pm search filter parity with pm list: add --updated-after/before, --created-after/before, --assignee, --sprint, --release, --parent

pm search supports only a subset of pm list's filter flags. Missing: --updated-after, --updated-before, --created-after, --created-before, --assignee, --assignee-filter, --sprint, --release, --parent. Agents doing incremental 'what changed since my last window' queries naturally reach for pm search (semantic mode) but cannot scope by time or owner. The filter gap means agents must fall back to pm list (keyword only), losing semantic ranking.

- pm search accepts all 8 missing filter flags matching pm list semantics
- SEARCH_FLAG_CONTRACTS and TOOL_SEARCH_FILTER_OPTION_CONTRACTS updated to include new flags
- MCP pm_search tool parameter table updated
- Shell completions (src/cli/commands/completion.ts bash/zsh/fish search sections) updated
- Docs updated: docs/COMMANDS.md search section and docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md token-minimal retrieval table
